description: 6 security fixes from the 2026-03-21 full-stack audit. Addresses 1 CRITIQUE (mass assignment), 1 HAUT (auth getSession), 1 HAUT (server actions Zod), and 3 MOYEN (CSP, CORS, Stripe status mapping).

userStories.title: Fix mass assignment on /api/update-contact with Zod whitelist
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want the update-contact API to validate input with a Zod schema whitelist so that attackers cannot modify arbitrary fields (role, team_id, auth_user_id) via the service role client.
acceptanceCriteria: Zod schema added to lib/validation/schemas.ts with explicit allowed fields (name, email, phone, provider_category, speciality, notes, company_name, company_id, display_name)
Route parses body through Zod schema before spreading into .update()
Invalid/extra fields are stripped (Zod .strict() or .pick())
Lint passes

userStories.title: Replace getSession() with getUser() in auth-dal.ts
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want the auth DAL to use supabase.auth.getUser() (server-validated) instead of getSession() (client JWT only) so that the entire auth chain is secure against token forgery.
acceptanceCriteria: lib/auth-dal.ts getUser() function calls supabase.auth.getUser() instead of supabase.auth.getSession()
Return type correctly extracts user from getUser() response
cache() wrapper preserved for deduplication
Lint passes

userStories.title: Add Zod validation to lot-actions.ts
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want lot server actions to validate input with Zod schemas so that malformed payloads cannot bypass TypeScript type safety at runtime.
acceptanceCriteria: Zod schema for updateCompleteLot input (lotId: uuid, lot: partial object with allowed fields, contacts: array)
Server action parses input through Zod before processing
Invalid input returns { success: false, error: 'Validation error: ...' }
Lint passes

userStories.title: Condition unsafe-eval to dev only in CSP
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want unsafe-eval removed from the CSP in production so that XSS attacks cannot use eval()/new Function().
acceptanceCriteria: next.config.js CSP script-src includes 'unsafe-eval' only when NODE_ENV === 'development'
Production CSP does NOT contain unsafe-eval
Lint passes

userStories.title: Fix CORS wildcard on /api/company/lookup
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want the CORS origin to use the site URL instead of wildcard * so that only the SEIDO domain can call this API.
acceptanceCriteria: OPTIONS handler uses NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL or falls back to 'self' origin from request headers
No more * wildcard in production
Lint passes

userStories.title: Add warning log in mapStripeStatus for unknown statuses
userStories.description: As a security auditor, I want mapStripeStatus to log a warning and fail-closed (not 'active') when encountering an unknown Stripe status so that future Stripe changes don't silently grant access.
acceptanceCriteria: mapStripeStatus logs logger.warn when status is not in the known map
Fallback changes from 'active' to 'past_due' (fail-closed)
Lint passes
